source_fixture_protocol: Generated once in a separate preparation process; every warm-up and measured process reused the same source package.
representative_result_policy: measured run nearest total_editor_ms median; earliest run breaks ties
byte_accounting: ZIP central-directory logical file_size and compressed compress_size; copied entries report source and output compressed bytes separately and additionally require equal source/output CRC and logical file_size
comparison_scope: Manual opt-in public WorkbookEditor Patch matrix. Source generation is a separate process; every warm-up/measured run reuses the same source so benchmark process PeakWorkingSet excludes WorkbookWriter fixture construction. openpyxl validates only representative outputs after benchmark timing; Office remains not_run.
